seoTitle: Wiley Park vs Willawarrin — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wiley Park and Willawarrin. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Wiley Park vs Willawarrin: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wiley Park and Willawarrin.
heading: Wiley Park vs Willawarrin — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wiley Park, New South Wales and Willawarrin, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Willawarrin has a lower overall climate risk score (45/100) compared to Wiley Park (50/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wiley Park or Willawarrin safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wiley Park has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Willawarrin scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wiley Park scores 65/100 for bushfire risk. Willawarrin scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wiley Park or Willawarrin?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Willawarrin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
